data.title: Moonbags, Bitcoin, and The Trifecta: Wendy O Unveils Her 4-Tier Strategy and AI Predictions
data.description:
In a recent episode of the Inside the Blockchain 100 AMA hosted by Binance Square, prominent crypto influencer Wendy O opened up about her remarkable journey from an underpaid healthcare worker to one of the most recognized female voices in the cryptocurrency space.
Boasting over a million combined followers across X, YouTube, and TikTok, Wendy O, who has been navigating the volatile crypto markets since 2017, shared her hard-won trading strategies, her bullish outlook on the intersection of AI and Web3, and why she believes crypto is the ultimate equalizer for women in finance.
From Long Commutes to Crypto Independence
Before she was a household name in crypto content, Wendy O was a patient care coordinator in Los Angeles. Despite loving her job, she felt stifled by the grueling commutes and the lack of upward financial mobility in the healthcare sector.
"There's not a lot of opportunity to get raises," Wendy O explained to host Karine. Seeking a way to be a stay-at-home mom for her young daughter, she began searching for alternatives. She discovered Bitcoin through libertarian radio broadcasts, which sparked her curiosity. Soon after, on the advice of a family friend, she hesitantly joined social media, eventually hosting over four dozen local crypto meetups across LA County.
Today, she credits the decentralized nature of the industry for changing her life. "The cool thing about crypto is it's 24/7, 365. All you really need is a cell phone to access it. It’s been a game changer for me."
The Maturation of a Trader: The 4-Tier Strategy
Looking back at her early days in 2017—when trading was heavily reliant on Bitcoin pairs rather than stablecoins—Wendy O admits to making rookie mistakes and engaging in risky trading behaviors. Today, her approach has dramatically matured, shifting from aggressive day trading to patient, long-term swing trading.
"The market is going to do what the market's going to do whether you like it or not. The market doesn't care about your feelings," she warned.
To manage risk, Wendy O now utilizes a strict four-tier investment system:
Tier 1: Bitcoin. Treated as a pristine collateral asset. "That’s something I don’t plan on selling ever," she noted, adding that she securely stores it off-site via financial advisors.Tier 2: Long-term Holds. Established altcoins like Ethereum, Solana, and XRP, mapped out with specific profit-taking targets.Tier 3: New Projects. High-potential new launches where she gets in and out rapidly.Tier 4: Meme Coins. Highly speculative assets where she previously applied the "moonbag strategy"—pulling out the initial investment and a small profit as soon as the asset pumps, leaving the "free" tokens to ride the market.
Her number one rule for surviving the crypto space? Keep a journal. Wendy O stressed that self-accountability is paramount. Traders must meticulously document their investments and profit-taking to avoid the ultimate trap: marrying your bags and blowing up your account.
The Future is AI and 'The Trifecta'
Looking toward the remainder of 2024 and into 2026, Wendy O is placing her bets heavily on the integration of Artificial Intelligence and cryptocurrency.
"I think that AI agents are going to take over in their own way, and it’s going to be a big part of crypto just because of microtransactions," she stated. For investors looking for the next narrative, she highlighted projects featuring what she calls "The Trifecta": AI, DeFi, and RWAs (Real World Assets).
Ultimately, Wendy O envisions a future where blockchain technology is entirely frictionless. "Everything’s going to be on-chain... future generations are going to be operating in crypto, and they're not even going to know they're operating in crypto."
A Champion for Women in Web3
Throughout her career, Wendy O has been a vocal advocate for female participation in the blockchain sector. While acknowledging that the internet can be a "weird place," she firmly believes the crypto industry has progressed and remains unparalleled in its accessibility.
"There are no real barriers to entry," she said. "If a woman wants to learn about crypto... we have so many capabilities at our fingertips. I actually think that crypto is the best place for a woman to work."
For those looking to follow in her footsteps and become crypto content creators, Wendy O’s advice is characteristically blunt and practical: "Consistency is incredibly important... get your behind up and get to work." She added that if she had to start all over again today, she would aggressively create content across multiple platforms, lean on AI for assistance, and most importantly: "I would not worry about what people thought about me, and I wouldn't read the comments."
The full interview with Wendy O is available on Binance Square's '[Inside the Blockchain 100](https://www.binance.com/en/square/audio/replay?id=39008457541242)'.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Drops Below 76,000 USDT with a Narrowed 0.69% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 18, 2026, 11:08 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has dropped below 76,000 USDT and is now trading at 75,921.398438 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 0.69% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Sources: Strait of Hormuz closed again
data.description: Shipping sources say merchant ships have received radio messages from the Iranian Navy informing them that the Strait of Hormuz is closed again, prohibiting any vessels from passing through. (Jinshi)

data.title: Banking Groups Intensify Lobbying Against Stablecoin Yield Ban in CLARITY Act Talks
data.description: Banking trade groups have increased their lobbying efforts against the proposed stablecoin yield compromise in ongoing CLARITY Act discussions. According to NS3.AI, the debate has focused on a White House estimate suggesting that a yield ban would result in only $2.1 billion in additional bank lending. The compromise aims to prohibit passive yield on stablecoin balances while permitting activity-based rewards. Senator Tillis mentioned that the text is still being finalized this week, whereas Senator Alsobrooks anticipates its completion probably next week.

data.title: Iranian Deputy Foreign Minister: US blockade of Iranian ports "will never be effective"
data.description: Iranian Deputy Foreign Minister Saeed Khatibzadeh stated that Iran will never accept a US blockade of its ports or any other "orders" issued by the US. "There will never be any blockades in the future," he said. "The era of colonialism must end," he added. The US "cannot dictate to other countries." (Jinshi)

data.title: Several ships attempted to pass through the Strait of Hormuz but ultimately turned back.
data.description: Ship tracking data shows that approximately 10 vessels attempted to pass through the Strait of Hormuz on the 18th but ultimately turned back. Shipping tracks indicate that several vessels turned back after reaching waters near Iran's Larak Island. Data shows that most of these vessels were oil tankers, and many were destined for India according to the Automatic Identification System (AIS). Iranian Foreign Minister Araqchi announced on the 17th that the Strait of Hormuz would be open to all merchant ships during the ceasefire between Lebanon and Israel. However, Iranian media reported on the 18th that due to the United States' "repeated breaches of promises," the Iranian military had tightened control over the Strait of Hormuz again. (Xinhua)

data.title: Ethereum Price Movements Could Trigger Significant Liquidations
data.description: Ethereum's price fluctuations may lead to substantial liquidations on major centralized exchanges. According to ChainCatcher, data from Coinglass indicates that if Ethereum surpasses $2,473, the cumulative liquidation intensity of short positions on mainstream centralized exchanges could reach $1.222 billion. Conversely, if Ethereum falls below $2,244, the cumulative liquidation intensity of long positions could amount to $712 million.

data.title: The total market capitalization of cryptocurrencies has increased by $430 billion since February 5th.
data.description: Data shows that since February 5, the total market capitalization of cryptocurrencies has increased by $430 billion.

data.title: Iran has stated that it has informed the US that it has not yet agreed to hold the next round of negotiations.
data.description: According to Iran's Tasnim News Agency on the 18th, Iran has not yet agreed to hold the next round of negotiations with the United States. Iran has informed US officials of this through Pakistan. According to sources from relevant departments, Iran has not yet agreed to hold the next round of negotiations due to the US's naval blockade and excessive demands during the talks. Iran emphasized that the main condition for continuing negotiations is that the US "avoid making excessive demands"; otherwise, Iran "is unwilling to waste time on protracted and meaningless negotiations." (Xinhua)

data.title: Binance Wallet features upgraded: supports one-click cryptocurrency purchases, earnings display, and a hotspot radar.
data.description: Binance Wallet has released a product update, making several optimizations to improve trading efficiency and asset management experience: - Supports one-click quick purchase of corresponding tokens after searching for token addresses; - The asset page now displays the annualized yield of mainstream cryptocurrencies and provides direct access to wealth management; - DeFi voucher token details pages now support staking and redemption operations, while displaying protocol information and yields; - A "Hotspot Radar" entry has been added to the watchlist for viewing market topics and trend signals.

data.title: Morgan Stanley Bitcoin Trust Wallet Identified with Significant Holdings
data.description: Arkham has identified the on-chain wallet address of the Morgan Stanley Bitcoin Trust (MSBT). According to Foresight News, this wallet currently holds 1,348 BTC.

data.title: U.S. Lawmaker Maxine Waters Faces Crypto Industry Influence
data.description:
California Democratic Representative Maxine Waters, a prominent figure in Congress advocating for stricter cryptocurrency regulation, is facing scrutiny as her opponent, nonprofit executive Myla Rahman, receives significant campaign funding from the crypto industry. According to BlockBeats, Rahman has raised approximately $14,500 since announcing her candidacy in February, with about 69% of the funds coming from the crypto sector. The largest single donation of $6,600 was made by Brad Garlinghouse, with additional support from executives at the Solana Policy Institute.

Waters, a senior member of the House Financial Services Committee, has been a strong proponent of increased regulation in the crypto industry. If the Democrats succeed in the upcoming midterm elections, she is poised to become the chair of the Financial Services Committee. Analysts suggest that this potential shift is prompting the crypto industry to strategically allocate political resources to influence future regulatory frameworks.

Currently, the crypto industry is advocating for the passage of the Clarity Act, which aims to establish a more lenient regulatory environment. However, this legislation faces strong opposition from the traditional banking sector, which fears it could lead to a shift of deposits into the crypto market.

Despite her regulatory stance, Waters has previously received political donations from Chris Larsen, indicating that crypto capital is strategically engaging with both parties and across different regulatory perspectives.

data.title: Arkham: The on-chain address for the Morgan Stanley Bitcoin ETF has been identified, currently holding 1348 Bitcoins.
data.description: Arkham announced on its X platform that it has identified the on-chain wallet address of Morgan Stanley Bitcoin Trust (MSBT), becoming the first platform to publicly identify the ETF's on-chain BTC holdings, allowing users to track fund inflows and outflows in real time. The Morgan Stanley Bitcoin ETF was listed on the NYSE Arca on April 8th, with Coinbase and BNY Mellon serving as custodians. According to Arkham's tracking data, it currently holds 1348 BTC, worth approximately $103.92 million.

data.title: Challenges Facing Young People Amid Economic Disparities
data.description: PANews posted on X (formerly Twitter). Bitwise advisor Jeff Park has expressed concerns about the financial challenges facing the younger generation. According to Park, the current financial system has structurally collapsed, leading to a widening gap between the wealthy and the less affluent. While the assets of the rich continue to appreciate, the wages of the poor are diminishing, creating an ever-deepening divide. This economic disparity has prompted many millennials to turn to Bitcoin, especially following the Occupy Wall Street movement, as they seek alternatives in the face of these challenges.

data.title: Iran Declines Next Round of Talks with the U.S.
data.description: Iran has not agreed to hold the next round of negotiations with the United States, according to ChainCatcher. The report, originally from Iran's Tasnim News Agency, highlights the ongoing diplomatic tensions between the two nations. The decision comes amid complex geopolitical dynamics and unresolved issues that continue to challenge bilateral relations.

data.title: Binance Wallet Introduces New Features for Enhanced User Experience
data.description:
Binance announced on X a series of updates to its wallet services aimed at improving user experience and functionality. The latest enhancements include a streamlined process for purchasing tokens, improved asset management features, and additional tools for decentralized finance (DeFi) enthusiasts.

The new update allows users to swiftly purchase tokens by searching for their addresses, simplifying the buying process significantly. Additionally, the asset page now displays the annualized yield rates of mainstream cryptocurrencies, providing users with quick access to investment opportunities. This feature is designed to help users make informed decisions by offering a clear view of potential returns.

For DeFi users, the wallet now supports staking and redemption directly from the token details page. This update also includes information on the protocols and annualized yield rates, offering a comprehensive overview for users interested in DeFi activities. Furthermore, a new 'Hot Radar' section has been added to the favorites bar, enabling users to explore trending topics and signals with ease.

These updates reflect Binance's ongoing commitment to enhancing its platform's usability and functionality. By integrating these features, Binance aims to provide a more seamless and informative experience for its users, catering to both novice and experienced cryptocurrency enthusiasts. The platform continues to evolve, offering tools and features that align with the dynamic needs of the digital asset community.

data.title: HIGH surged above 0.4 USDT, a 315% increase in the last 24 hours.

data.title: Highstreet Token Surges Over 315% in 24 Hours
data.description: Highstreet (HIGH) has experienced a significant price increase, surpassing 0.4 USDT. According to Odaily, the token is currently trading at 0.478 USDT, marking a 24-hour rise of 315%.

data.title: Saudi Arabia's Sovereign Wealth Fund Reduces Spending Amid Cash Strains
data.description: Saudi Arabia's sovereign wealth fund is scaling back its expenditures due to financial pressures, impacting its ambitious mega-projects and notable international investments. Wall Street Journal (Markets) posted on X that the fund, known for its significant global presence, is facing challenges in maintaining its previous levels of investment. The decision to reduce spending comes as the fund navigates economic constraints, prompting a reassessment of its financial strategies. This move is expected to influence the progress of several high-profile projects and investments worldwide, reflecting the broader economic adjustments within the kingdom.
